summary.title: Automated Incident Response
summary.description: Threat model for a semi-automated incident response pipeline that detects container-level attacks using ELK Stack

data.name: Attacker
data.description: Simulates threats against the vulnerable app

data.name: SOC Analyst
data.description: Reviews alerts and approves response actions

data.name: SecureBank API
data.description: The vulnerable Flask application being monitored

threats.title: JWT Token Forgery
threats.description: Provide a descrAttacker forges JWT using weak secret to impersonate legitimate usersiption for this threat
threats.mitigation: Strong JWT secret, short token expiration, signature validation

threats.title: SQL Injection on Transfer
threats.description: Attacker manipulates fund transfer amounts via SQL injectiontion for this threat
threats.mitigation: Strong secret, short expiration, signature validation

threats.title: Privilege Escalation
threats.description: Attacker modifies JWT role claim to escalate from user to admin
threats.mitigation: Server-side role enforcement, never trust client-side claims

data.name: Filebeat
data.description: Collects and ships logs from containers

threats.title: Expedition
threats.description: Logs altered in transit attacker covers their tracks before data reaches ELK
threats.mitigation: TLS encryption between Filebeat and Logstash

threats.title: Denial of Service
threats.description: Usage may resemble legitimate application usage but leads to exhaustion of resources
threats.mitigation: Mitigation or prevention such as providing backoff, resource management and avoiding forced deadlock

data.name: Logstash
data.description: Parses, filters, and enriches log data

data.name: ElastAlert2
data.description: Runs detection rules and generates alerts

threats.title: Expedition
threats.description: Attacker modifies detection rules to suppress alerts for their activity
threats.mitigation: Rules stored in version control, file integrity monitoring, container runs as non-root

threats.title: Vulnerability scanning
threats.description: Evidence files contain passwords or tokens captured during container inspection
threats.mitigation: Encrypt evidence at rest, role-based access

threats.title: Expedition
threats.description: Alert fires but no record of who saw it or acted on it
threats.mitigation: Audit log for every alert state change

threats.title: Expedition
threats.description: Fake approval triggers destructive response isolates or stops the wrong container
threats.mitigation: Authenticate all approvals, SOC analyst identity verification

threats.title: Vulnerability scanning
threats.description: Handler has Docker socket access — attacker escalates to host
threats.mitigation: Read-only Docker socket, restrict API calls, least privilege

threats.title: Tampering
threats.description: Response command modified in transit  "isolate" becomes "delete"

threats.title: Repudiation
threats.description: Response action taken but not logged no accountability
threats.mitigation: Audit trail with timestamp, actor, action, and result

data.name: Elasticsearch
data.description: Stores and indexes all security events

threats.title: Scraping
threats.description: Collecting accessible data and/or processed output from the application
threats.mitigation: Read-only indices for evidence, append-only alert logs, snapshot backups

data.name: Kibana Dashboard
data.description: Visualization layer for alerts and evidence

threats.title: Expedition
threats.description: Unauthorized user accesses dashboard and views all alerts and evidence
